languages.text: {n}Манипулус устало поднимает на вас взгляд.{/n} "Всякой вещи в этом мире есть предел, Вольный Торговец. Увы, моему терпению тоже. В таком состоянии я... я... не способен владеть своими эмоциями достаточно хорошо. Простите меня".

{n}The Manipulus raises his gaze to you, looking weary.{/n} "Everything has its breaking point, Rogue Trader. Including my patience. As I am now... I cannot... I cannot govern my feelings well enough. I am sorry."
languages.original_text: {n}Манипулус устало поднимает на вас взгляд.{/n} "Всякой вещи в этом мире есть предел, Вольный Торговец. Увы, моему терпению тоже. В таком состоянии я... я... не способен владеть своими эмоциями достаточно хорошо. Простите меня".

languages.text: {n}Der Manipulus richtet seinen erschöpften Blick auf dich.{/n} "Alles ist irgendwann zu Ende, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Auch meine Geduld. Wie ich jetzt bin ... Ich kann nicht ... Ich kann meine Gefühle nicht gut genug regulieren. Es tut mir leid."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus raises his gaze to you, looking weary.{/n} "Everything has its breaking point, Rogue Trader. Including my patience. As I am now... I cannot... I cannot govern my feelings well enough. I am sorry."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Manipulus richtet seinen erschöpften Blick auf dich.{/n} "Alles ist irgendwann zu Ende, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Auch meine Geduld. Wie ich jetzt bin ... Ich kann nicht ... Ich kann meine Gefühle nicht gut genug regulieren. Es tut mir leid."

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus lève les yeux vers vous, épuisé.{/n} « Rien n'est éternel, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Pas même ma patience. Dans mon état... Je ne peux pas... Réguler suffisamment mes émotions. Je suis navré. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus raises his gaze to you, looking weary.{/n} "Everything has its breaking point, Rogue Trader. Including my patience. As I am now... I cannot... I cannot govern my feelings well enough. I am sorry."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le manipulus lève les yeux vers vous, épuisé.{/n} « Rien n'est éternel, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Pas même ma patience. Dans mon état... Je ne peux pas... Réguler suffisamment mes émotions. Je suis navré. »

languages.text: {n}El manipulus levanta la mirada hacia ti, con aspecto cansado.{/n} «Todo tiene su límite, Comerciante Independiente. Incluyendo mi paciencia. En mi estado actual... no puedo... no puedo controlar suficientemente mis emociones. Lo lamento».
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus raises his gaze to you, looking weary.{/n} "Everything has its breaking point, Rogue Trader. Including my patience. As I am now... I cannot... I cannot govern my feelings well enough. I am sorry."

traits.locale_text: {n}El manipulus levanta la mirada hacia ti, con aspecto cansado.{/n} «Todo tiene su límite, Comerciante Independiente. Incluyendo mi paciencia. En mi estado actual... no puedo... no puedo controlar suficientemente mis emociones. Lo lamento».

languages.text: {n}Manipülus yorgun hâlde bakışlarını sana çeviriyor.{/n}"Her şeyin bir kırılma noktası vardır Hür Tacir. Benim sabrım da dâhil. Şu anki hâlimle... Yapamıyorum... Duygularımı yeterince iyi yönetemiyorum. Üzgünüm."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus raises his gaze to you, looking weary.{/n} "Everything has its breaking point, Rogue Trader. Including my patience. As I am now... I cannot... I cannot govern my feelings well enough. I am sorry."

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipülus yorgun hâlde bakışlarını sana çeviriyor.{/n}"Her şeyin bir kırılma noktası vardır Hür Tacir. Benim sabrım da dâhil. Şu anki hâlimle... Yapamıyorum... Duygularımı yeterince iyi yönetemiyorum. Üzgünüm."

languages.text: {n}操纵者抬眼看向你，神情疲惫。{/n}“凡事都有极限，行商浪人，包括我的耐心。以我现在的状态……我没办法……我没办法很好地控制情绪。抱歉。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus raises his gaze to you, looking weary.{/n} "Everything has its breaking point, Rogue Trader. Including my patience. As I am now... I cannot... I cannot govern my feelings well enough. I am sorry."

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者抬眼看向你，神情疲惫。{/n}“凡事都有极限，行商浪人，包括我的耐心。以我现在的状态……我没办法……我没办法很好地控制情绪。抱歉。”

languages.text: {n}マニピュルスは、疲れ果てた様子で、あなたへと視線を上げる。{/n}「何事にも限界点というものがあります、ローグトレーダー。私の忍耐も、その例外ではありません。今のこの私には……できないのです……自らの感情を、十分に御することが。申し訳ありません」
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus raises his gaze to you, looking weary.{/n} "Everything has its breaking point, Rogue Trader. Including my patience. As I am now... I cannot... I cannot govern my feelings well enough. I am sorry."

traits.locale_text: {n}マニピュルスは、疲れ果てた様子で、あなたへと視線を上げる。{/n}「何事にも限界点というものがあります、ローグトレーダー。私の忍耐も、その例外ではありません。今のこの私には……できないのです……自らの感情を、十分に御することが。申し訳ありません」
